fix: PR Zero cycle 31 — knowledge JSON guards, Neo4j topology leak

why: Zero-tolerance quality standard from project inception

what: Multi-agent memory orchestration v2.0.0
why: Collaborative agents need quota-managed shared memory

what: Memory Enhancement — graph search, LLM extraction, multi-model embedding, causal reasoning
why: Core intelligence upgrade for richer memory understanding

what: Smart ingestion — git-aware file discovery + streaming persistence
why: Avoid data loss during ingestion, incremental updates via manifest

what: Self-healing health monitor with shared observability probes
why: Circuit breaker resilience for Neo4j/Qdrant/SQLite backend failures

what: Memory migration & persistence (Phase 0+1)
Add codebase_list_projects MCP tool with discovery
From n-gram hash vectorization to BM25+TF-IDF
why: Deterministic and reproducible semantic search quality

what: From session-based memory to multi-agent memory orchestration
why: Collaborative agents with quota management needed

what: From basic event store to causal reasoning with Neo4j graph queries
why: Link decisions to outcomes automatically via directional search

what: From single-model embedding to multi-model with profiles and re-ranking
why: Different content types need different embedding strategies

what: From separate MCP/REST APIs to consolidated single-port architecture
why: Simplify deployment and reduce operational complexity

what: vitest to bun:test migration
Resolved all 10 veracity audit issues (#12-#22)
why: Critical security and correctness fixes from comprehensive audit

decision: Memory sync restored — MemoryManager SQL alias fix + MCP admin auth bypass + session cap raised
evidence: 5/5 canonical queries return >=1 hit (was 0/5). MCP tools healthy with admin auth.

decision: Ingestion coverage >=95% across 5 projects — raised defaults + rewrote verify denominator + restored .ai/.md includes
evidence: 5/5 projects (ping-mem, ping-learn, ping-guard, auto-os, understory) pass ingestion verify.

decision: Ollama self-heal 3-tier closed — ping-guard JSON-schema preamble + ping-mem HealthMonitor fast-tick 60s->10s
followup: watch for WatchEngine canary-cycle re-entrant skipping

decision: Lifecycle + supervisor + plist hardening — disk cleanup, Interactive ProcessType, keep-forward supervisor
evidence: Disk 83% <=85%. Daemon ProcessType=Interactive. Supervisor keep-forward confirmed.

decision: Observability — ping-mem-doctor CLI with 34 gates (7 groups), /ui/health dashboard, launchd 15-min cadence
evidence: Doctor exit 0 all-pass, exit 2 on deliberate break. /ui/health renders. 34 gates (upgraded from 29 in plan).

decision: auto-os integration — pingmem_client long-lived session + deep_search fix + schema persist field
E2E regression CI + 30-day soak acceptance — 10-query bun test suite + soak-monitor launchd + serialization fix
evidence: 10/10 regression queries pass (8.09s). Full suite 1973/0/0. Baseline soak day 0 (target day 30: 2026-05-19).
followup: ping-mem#126 — CI workflow for self-hosted runner

decision: Docs + decisions log + orphan sweep + tag v2.0.0 + handoff
evidence: AGENT_INTEGRATION_GUIDE.md §14 added. README operational CLI section. 11 orphan native/<file> rows swept (pre-Phase-1 residue). state.md updated. Tag v2.0.0-ping-mem-complete-remediation pushed.
